2222550.name: Feast or Fracture
2222550.description:
Welcome to Feast or Fracture, where lifestyle - a measure or prosperity, stability, and luxury - is the metric of success. Build towns, recruit units, invest in ancient research - but win by bringing every player's lifestyle to a level not seen since the Collapse.

What's involved:
  • Explore a bountiful, randomly-generated world, filled with artefacts and wreckage of the Bronze Age Collapse.
  • Balance internal factions led by charismatic leaders. Keep them happy, or your kingdom will fracture!
  • React to dozens of in-game events, with branching outcomes and kingdom-wide impacts.
  • Compete with petty, selfish neighbors - or find a way to cooperate. Send delegations to negotiate, for everything from food donations to study abroad programs.

Can you fulfill your ultimate mission?

Can you create a better world?
